US: US1: Save and insert predefined responses in chats
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Verify Editor nav
Title: button next to GIF
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button

Step:
4. Hover over Saved Responses button
5. Verify tooltip
Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved Responses"

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal
Title: modal shown on click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Step:
3. Press Ctrl/Cmd+K
4. Verify modal
Title: modal shown via shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal via shortcut

Step: 5. Verify Create New button
Title: Create New button in top-right
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Create New" button in top-right corner

Step:
5. Hover Create New button
6. Verify tooltip
Title: Create New button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Create New"

Step: 5. Verify modal with no saved responses
Title: empty state message
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats."

Step: 5. Verify list on left side of modal
Title: list displayed on left side
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of saved response titles on left side ordered by latest updated time

Title: FREQUENTLY USED hidden when no usage
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no frequently used responses

Step: 6. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: top 5 most-used shown
Expectation: - SHOULD show top 5 most-used saved responses

Title: fewer than 5 responses
Expectation: - SHOULD show all available when fewer than 5 responses

Title: FREQUENTLY USED sort order
Expectation: - SHOULD sort by usage_count descending then title A-Z

Step: 7. Verify ALL section
Title: ALL section lists all responses
Expectation: - SHOULD list all saved responses sorted by title A-Z

Step: 8. Verify default selection
Title: first item selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select first saved response in list by default

Step:
9. Press Up/Down arrow keys
10. Verify selection
Title: arrow keys navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD move selection between responses using arrow keys

Step: 8. Verify right side of modal
Title: message detail on right side
Expectation: - SHOULD display title and message detail of selected response on right side

Step:
9. Hover over message detail
10. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot on hover message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button on hover over message detail

Title: scrollable message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling when message content is long

Step:
9. Hover over response title in list
10. Verify detail updates
Title: hover title to preview detail
Expectation: - SHOULD display message detail when hovering over response title

Step:
11. Scroll to bottom of list
12. Verify pagination
Title: pagination load 20 items
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 items initially and load next 20 on scroll

Step: 11. Verify footer
Title: footer shortcut list
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of shortcuts in footer

Step:
11. Click X button
12. Verify modal closes
Title: X button closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal

Step:
11. Press Esc
12. Verify modal closes
Title: Esc closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation
3. Open Saved Responses modal
4. Verify Search box
Title: search box empty with placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty search box with placeholder "Search saved response"

Step:
5. Focus on Search box
6. Verify placeholder
Title: focus placeholder change
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to "Enter keyword..."

Step:
7. Type text in Search box
8. Verify x icon
Title: x icon on input
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when text is entered

Step:
9. Click x icon
10. Verify search cleared
Title: clear search by x icon
Expectation: - SHOULD remove search text and show full list

Step:
7. Type 1 character
8. Verify search starts
Title: search from 1 character
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character

Title: search by title and message
Expectation: - SHOULD return results where title or message contains keyword

Title: case-insensitive partial match
Expectation: - SHOULD match case-insensitively and partially

Step:
7. Search for non-existing keyword
8. Verify results
Title: no results found display
Expectation: - SHOULD show "Search results (0)"

Step:
7. Search for existing keyword
8. Verify results
Title: matching results count
Expectation: - SHOULD show "Search results ({number})" with match count

Title: first result selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select first search result by default

Step:
9. Scroll to bottom of results
10. Verify pagination
Title: search results pagination
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 items initially and load next 20 on scroll

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation
3. Open Saved Responses modal
4. Click 3-dot button on a response
5. Verify submenu
Title: submenu with Edit and Delete
Expectation: - SHOULD display submenu with "Edit response" and "Delete response" options

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation
3. Open Saved Responses modal
4. Click Create New button
5. Verify popup
Title: Create Saved Response popup shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup with title "Create Saved Response"

Step:
6. Click X button
7. Verify popup closes
Title: X button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup

Step:
6. Hover info icon next to TITLE
7. Verify tooltip
Title: TITLE field info tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages."

Step: 6. Verify TITLE field
Title: TITLE field empty with placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty required field with placeholder "Name this response for easy search"

Step:
6. Input 140 characters in TITLE
7. Try to type more
8. Verify input blocked
Title: TITLE max 140 characters
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 140 characters

Step:
6. Paste text longer than 140 chars into TITLE
7. Verify truncation
Title: TITLE paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD paste only first 140 characters

Step: 6. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: MESSAGE field empty with placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty required field with placeholder "Write the full message you want to send to clients"

Step:
6. Paste formatted text into MESSAGE
7. Verify formatting cleared
Title: MESSAGE clear text-formatting
Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting when pasting formatted text

Step:
6. Input 10,000 characters in MESSAGE
7. Try to type more
8. Verify input blocked
Title: MESSAGE max 10,000 characters
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow input beyond 10,000 characters

Step:
6. Type in MESSAGE field
7. Verify counter
Title: MESSAGE character counter
Expectation: - SHOULD display character count as "{X}/10000"

Step:
6. Paste text longer than 10,000 chars into MESSAGE
7. Verify truncation
Title: MESSAGE paste truncation
Expectation: - SHOULD paste only first 10,000 characters

Step: 6. Verify Cancel button
Title: Cancel button always enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD always enable Cancel button

Step:
6. Click Cancel button
7. Verify popup closes
Title: Cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup

Step: 6. Verify Save button
Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD disable Save button by default

Step:
6. Input in both TITLE and MESSAGE
7. Verify Save button
Title: Save enabled with both fields
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button when both fields have input

Step:
8. Click Save button
9. Verify response added
Title: save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD add response to list and show toast "New Saved Response created."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation
3. Open Saved Responses modal
4. Click 3-dot on a response
5. Click Edit response
6. Verify popup
Title: Edit Saved Response popup shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup with title "Edit Saved Response"

Step: 7. Verify TITLE field
Title: TITLE pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE field with existing value

Step:
7. Click X button without changes
8. Verify popup closes
Title: X close without changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup

Step:
7. Edit TITLE or MESSAGE
8. Click X button
9. Verify discard popup
Title: X close with changes shows discard
Expectation: - SHOULD show "Discard Changes?" popup with warning text

Step:
10. Click Cancel or X on discard popup
11. Verify discard popup closes
Title: discard popup Cancel/X closes
Expectation: - SHOULD close discard popup and return to edit popup

Step:
10. Click Discard Changes button
11. Verify edit popup closes
Title: Discard Changes discards edits
Expectation: - SHOULD close edit popup without saving changes

Step:
7. Edit fields
8. Click Save button
9. Verify update
Title: edit success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD show toast "Saved Response updated successfully."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation
3. Open Saved Responses modal
4. Click 3-dot on a response
5. Click Delete response
6. Verify popup
Title: delete confirmation popup shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Delete Response?" confirmation popup

Step:
7. Click Cancel button
8. Verify popup closes
Title: Cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup

Step:
7. Click OK button
8. Verify deletion
Title: OK deletes and shows toast
Expectation: - SHOULD delete response and show toast "Saved Response deleted."
